title: After the Tenno Sho (Spring): Victory and a New Dream

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower proves to be a spectacular
opponent, but Matikanetannhauser wins the
spring Tenno Sho. She praises everyone who ran
and promises to do her best next time as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next goal is the Takarazuka Kinen. The
following morning, on her way to some
independent training, Matikanetannhauser spots
Mejiro McQueen running hard.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's deeply impressed, watching McQueen
channel her disappointment from the spring
Tenno Sho into preparation for the Takarazuka
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The medium-distance G1 Takarazuka Kinen is
two months away. We need to put everything
we've got into training if we're going to win!
